A '''green-skinned species''' lived in [[The galaxy]]. A group of the species, who served as woodsmen, landed on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] to harvest the moon's trees. They also enslaved a number of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] and [[foonar]]s in order to further their efforts, including [[Dooni]]'s [[Dooni's mother|mother]].

{{Species-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] {{1st}}
